'''fagogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wussification|wussification]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wussification|wussification]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fagogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fægegeth|fægegeth]] || [[word:fægegej|fægegej]] || [[word:fægegesh|fægegesh]] || [[word:fægege|fægege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fagogogoth|fagogogoth]] || [[word:fagogogoj|fagogogoj]] || [[word:fagogogosh|fagogogosh]] || [[word:fagogogo|fagogogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fagogoth|fagogoth]] || [[word:fagogoj|fagogoj]] || [[word:fagogosh|fagogosh]] || [[word:fagogo|fagogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fagofgoth|fagofgoth]] || [[word:fagofgoj|fagofgoj]] || [[word:fagofgosh|fagofgosh]] || [[word:fagofgof|fagofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fagogotho|fagogotho]] || [[word:fagogojo|fagogojo]] || [[word:fagogosho|fagogosho]] || [[word:fagogoko|fagogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fagogoth|fagogoth]] || [[word:fagogoj|fagogoj]] || [[word:fagogosh|fagogosh]] || [[word:fagogo|fagogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fagogothol|fagogothol]] || [[word:fagogojol|fagogojol]] || [[word:fagogoshol|fagogoshol]] || [[word:fagogokol|fagogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fagogothotho|fagogothotho]] || [[word:fagogojojo|fagogojojo]] || [[word:fagogoshosho|fagogoshosho]] || [[word:fagogoko|fagogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fagogothon|fagogothon]] || [[word:fagogojon|fagogojon]] || [[word:fagogoshon|fagogoshon]] || [[word:fagogokon|fagogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fagogothoro|fagogothoro]] || [[word:fagogojoro|fagogojoro]] || [[word:fagogoshoro|fagogoshoro]] || [[word:fagogokoro|fagogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
